CodexReviewFixRunner.docs: Infrastructure adapter implementing the ReviewFixRunner secondary port using Codex CLI. Handles: (1) smoke-test: forbidden sandbox flag check (danger-full-access / dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox) and codex CLI version range check (>= 0.115.0, < 1.0.0) per CN-04; (2) credential isolation: GITHUB_TOKEN / SSH_AUTH_SOCK / GIT_SSH / GIT_SSH_COMMAND (set to /bin/false) / SSH_CONNECTION / SSH_CLIENT excluded, HOME replaced with a temporary directory per CN-05; (3) sandbox config: sandbox_workspace_write with writable_roots including CODEX_HOME (~/.codex) and network_access=true per IN-02/IN-06 (enables nested reviewer session creation and LLM API access); (4) codex exec spawning; (5) sentinel parsing: REVIEW_FIX_STATUS: completed/blocked_cross_scope/failed full-line match per AC-08; (6) exit-code mapping. Private fields hold the model, timeout, and scope configuration.
